title: Add Advertisements Section to Suraj Navodaya App

requirements.summary: Add React Query hooks for advertisements management
acceptanceCriteria: useGetAds hook fetches all ads from the backend actor
useAddAd mutation invalidates the ads query cache on success
useToggleAd mutation toggles the isActive field and invalidates the ads cache

file_operations.description: Add three new React Query hooks: useGetAds (query to fetch all advertisements from backend.getAllAds), useAddAd (mutation calling backend.addAd with title, description, imageUrl, linkUrl and invalidating 'ads' query key on success), and useToggleAd (mutation calling backend.toggleAdActive with ad id and invalidating 'ads' query key on success). Follow the existing pattern used for students, notices, and exams hooks.

requirements.summary: Create Advertisements page with active ads display and admin dialog form
acceptanceCriteria: Advertisements page renders a list of active ad banner cards
Each card shows title, description, and a clickable external link if linkUrl is provided
An 'Add Advertisement' dialog form allows entering title, description, imageUrl, and linkUrl
Empty state is shown using the EmptyState component when no ads exist
Page uses maroon-and-gold color tokens consistent with the rest of the app

file_operations.description: Create a new page component that uses useGetAds to fetch advertisements and displays active ads as visually styled banner cards with title, description, and optional external link button. Include an 'Add Advertisement' button in the PageHeader action slot that opens a Dialog form with Input fields for title, description, imageUrl (text URL input), and linkUrl. Use useAddAd mutation to submit new ads. Show EmptyState component with MegaphoneIcon when no active ads exist. Apply maroon-and-gold theme using CSS custom properties (--primary, --maroon, --gold) matching the existing app styling. Each ad card should conditionally render an external link button only if linkUrl is provided. Use admin-only guard similar to other pages if needed.

requirements.summary: Wire Advertisements page into navigation and routing
acceptanceCriteria: Header desktop nav includes an 'Advertisements' button
Header mobile hamburger menu includes an 'Advertisements' item
App.tsx renders the Advertisements page when the 'Advertisements' nav item is active

file_operations.description: Add an 'Advertisements' navigation button to the desktop nav buttons array (alongside Home, Students, Notices Board, Exam Schedule) and add a corresponding menu item to the mobile hamburger menu. Use MegaphoneIcon from lucide-react for the nav icon. Ensure the active state styling is applied when 'Advertisements' is the active page.

Import the new Advertisements page component and add 'Advertisements' as a fifth valid page option in the activePage state type. Add a case in the page rendering logic to display the Advertisements component when activePage === 'Advertisements'. Ensure the page state is correctly passed to Header for active nav highlighting.

requirements.summary: Display active ads preview section on Home dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Home page shows a preview section for active ads
A 'View All' button navigates to the Advertisements page
If no active ads exist, the preview section is hidden or shows a brief empty message

file_operations.description: Add a new preview section for active advertisements below the existing Recent Notices and Upcoming Exams sections. Use useGetAds hook to fetch ads and filter for isActive === true. Display up to 3 active ads in a horizontal scrolling or grid layout with each ad showing title and a brief description excerpt. Include a 'View All' button that calls setActivePage('Advertisements'). If no active ads exist, conditionally hide the section or show a brief empty message. Match the existing card styling and layout patterns used for notices and exams previews. Use MegaphoneIcon for the section icon.
